response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with deep experience in web, mobile, and backend systems, but the role requires highly specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. The brief stint at National Instruments writing C/C++ for a measurement IDE is the closest adjacency, but it does not approach the principal-level hardware architecture depth required. Educational background (BS in CS) would require 8+ years of relevant technical experience in the domain, which is not demonstrated.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) as a senior/staff software engineer
Low-latency, high-throughput backend experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or accelerator experience
No AI/deep learning workload or GPU architecture background
Profile is web/full-stack focused, not hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
Seasoned senior engineer with systems-level breadth
